nasb.text: The Lord said to Joshua, “See, I have given Jericho into your hand, with its king and the valiant warriors.

esv.text: And the Lord said to Joshua, “See, I have given Jericho into your hand, with its king and mighty men of valor.

cnv.text: 耶和華對約書亞說：“看，我已經把耶利哥和耶利哥的王，以及英勇的戰士，都交在你的手中了。

ccb.text: 耶和华对约书亚说：“看啊，我已经把耶利哥、耶利哥王及其英勇的战士都交在你手中了。
